title: FullBrightness
description: Makes everything bright just like night vision
body:
<center>

[![Discord Badge](https://img.shields.io/discord/1051116089133777016?color=green&label=Discord&logo=Discord&logoColor=green&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/jVmUTGFMX5)  

# **Fullbright Resource Pack**  

</center>

---

### ✨ Features
- **Brightness Boost**: Increases overall brightness for clear visibility everywhere.  
- **Underwater Vision**: See clearly even in the deepest oceans.  
- **Illuminated Caves**: Explore caves and mines without the need for torches.  
- **Radiant Nights**: Move through the night as if it were day.  
- **Compatible with Other Packs**: Works seamlessly with other resource packs.  

---

### ⚙️ Requirements
- **OptiFine**: This resource pack requires OptiFine to work properly.  
  Make sure to install it before adding the texture pack.  

---
